(10 comments)

Thanks for the patch.  I think the functional implementation is OK, just the option names need to be fixed so they are consistent between "lfs find", "lfs getdirstripe", and "lfs setdirstripe".

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Sorry, I just noticed that there is no test case for this new feature, so there is no way to know that it is working, or that it continues to work in the future. There are already several tests for "lfs find" that can be used as a starting point (maybe sanity.sh test 35 or so?) and "lfs getstripe --mdt-count" should be verified against "lfs mkdir --mdt-count".
